Your local custom cabinet making company

Custom Cabinetry is our passion and that means that what ever we do, we do it with all our hearts. We feel it is our calling to value Integrity in our work. Our goal is excellence.

Services

However big or small your space may be, we can design and maximize it, and make it unique and beautiful. We like to call it “Building your dreams”

About Us

Custom cabinetry is our passion, it is our calling and we have integrity in our work. Our goal is excellence! Let us bring your dreams to life! Since 2003, Top Grain Interiors with owner Misho Papuga and his crew have been specializing in cabinets , built-ins, wine rooms and much more. Misho loves his art of designing, bringing joy to his customers lives.

read more

Selected projects

White Bookshelf with Sharker Doors and Shiplap Back
Cherry Kitchen Cabinets Modified, Changed Door Style and Refinished in White Color
Contemporary Euro Style High Gloss White Kitchen

Contact Us
